title: Delete / Change Multiple Column
excerpt: It would be great to be able to select multiple columns at the same time, then change their column type or even delete them.

posts.author: SHardham (Simon Hardham)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to be able to select multiple columns at the same time, then change their column type or even delete them.

posts.author: richpeers (Rich Peers)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be really helpful function as frustrating having to change or deleting column individually.

posts.author: Rua (Acorn)
posts.cookedHtml:
Agreed!
Particularly when setting up a new board with lots of columns. moving them 1 at a time is a real drag.

posts.author: TanyaB (Tanya B)
posts.cookedHtml: Definately need this. Sometimes I need to move multiple columns to front/back of the board and it takes ages to drag and drop loads of them. Or if I want to make a bunch of columns the same width, it is almost impossible cause it is all guess work and individual

posts.author: mindyr (Mindy Rosenshein)
posts.cookedHtml: This is SO CRITICAL!! I would love to see this feature added. It can be very frustrating to have to manually delete multiple columns individually. I would also love to see the same option for GROUPS, to be able to select multiple groups and delete them. Currently, you can delete all of the items using a batch action easily, but the groups all remain.

posts.author: Jason_Mroz (Jason Mroz)
posts.cookedHtml: Every time I go to look up how to do something on Monday I see a thread like this of frustrated people who have tried to do the same thing and can’t. If we can bulk select rows we should be able to bulk select columns!

posts.author: SHK (Sam Hancock)
posts.cookedHtml: Totally agree, weird that you can’t, very limiting.

posts.author: shirozayas (Shiro Zayas)
posts.cookedHtml: Great idea! Specially when creating a new board and need to delete de default columns and then rearrange or manage new columns.

posts.author: Acruz (Ana)
posts.cookedHtml: This feature would be of great help to save time when updating boards.

posts.author: i.moreno (Ignacio Moreno Ortega [Decadis AG])
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!,
I am part of the Decadis team and I would like to recommend you our application, Batch Hero for monday

In particular, to the section of the Operations . These operations can be used to add, copy or delete columns.

If you need assistance on how to use the application, please, feel free to create a request in our support portal , we will be happy to help you.

Best regards,
Nacho
